/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/SCHOOLFESTIVAL.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/SCHOOLFESTIVAL.dir/ПейоЯворовПрограма/PeioQvorovPrograma.cpp.o CMakeFiles/SCHOOLFESTIVAL.dir/ПейоЯворовПрограма/QvorovMainFrame.cpp.o -o SCHOOLFESTIVAL  /home/ivan/raylib/src/libraylib.a -lGL -lm -lpthread -ldl -lrt -lX11
